Headline: #71 71st/South Shore Temporary Northbound Reroute near Exchange/73rd
ShortDescription: NB 71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted via Exchange, Yates-South Shore, 71st and over normal route: due to, street blockage near Exchange/73rd.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound  #71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted via Exchange, Yates-South Shore, 71st and over normal route: due to, street blockage near Exchange/73rd.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Green Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Green Line trains are running with delays near Garfield due to track switching problems. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Green Line trains are running with delays near Garfield due to track switching problems.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that might serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore normal service. Allow extra travel time.
